info.title: Payment Tools API
info.description: Enterprise payment tooling APIs that allow financial institutions and fintech platforms to automate payments, configure transaction limits, perform fraud monitoring, manage invoices, and implement payment validation and confirmation flows. These APIs help organizations manage complex payment operations including batch payments, recurring payments, invoice-based collections, and advanced risk management.

tags.name: Payment Automation
tags.description: APIs for automating payment operations including batch payments, scheduled payments, and invoice-based payment flows.

tags.name: Payment Controls & Risk
tags.description: APIs for payment governance including validation, fraud monitoring, transaction limits, and payment confirmation.

post.description: Processes multiple payments in a single batch request allowing financial institutions or enterprises to execute bulk disbursements efficiently.

details: The batch payment payload contains invalid or missing required fields such as batchId, organizationId, paymentCount, or sourceAccount. Verify that all mandatory parameters are provided and formatted correctly.

post.description: Creates scheduled or recurring payment instructions for automated disbursement on predefined schedules.

details: A recurring payment configuration with the same scheduleId or parameters already exists in the system. Modify the schedule configuration or use a unique schedule identifier before submitting the request.

post.description: Automatically handles failed transactions with retry logic, fallback payment methods, or notification triggers.

details: The failure handling configuration contains invalid retry parameters such as retryIntervalSeconds or maxRetryAttempts. Ensure retry rules and fallback methods follow supported configuration policies.

post.description: Defines custom payment limits for accounts or organizations to prevent excessive or unauthorized transactions.

details: The configured transaction limit exceeds the maximum allowed policy for the specified account or organization. Review the limit configuration parameters before resubmitting the request.

post.description: Generates customized invoices that customers can pay using supported payment channels.

example.errorMessage: Customer not found for invoice creation.
details: The provided customerId does not exist in the billing or customer management system. Verify that the customer identifier is correct before attempting to generate the invoice.

post.description: Validates payment data including beneficiary verification, AML screening, and account balance validation.

example.errorMessage: Authentication failed for payment validation request.
details: The OAuth2 access token provided in the Authorization header is missing, invalid, or expired. Obtain a valid access token before attempting the payment validation request.

post.description: Confirms payment completion and generates final settlement confirmation.

details: The specified transactionId does not exist or has already been settled in the payment system. Verify the transaction reference before submitting the confirmation request.

post.description: Analyzes payment activity to detect fraud using behavioral analytics and risk scoring.

example.errorMessage: Fraud detection service rate limit exceeded.
details: The fraud detection engine is currently processing a high volume of requests and cannot handle additional analysis requests. Retry the request after the specified retry interval.

post.description: Collects configurable service fees for transactions such as processing fees, platform charges, or regulatory fees.

402.description: Fee payment required or insufficient balance

example.errorMessage: Insufficient balance to collect service fee.
details: The account associated with the transaction does not have sufficient balance to cover the configured service fee and taxes. Ensure adequate funds are available before retrying the fee collection request.

X-Correlation-ID.description: Unique request identifier for tracing requests across systems.
X-Correlation-ID.name: X-Correlation-ID

x-tenant.description: Unique request identifier for tracing requests across systems.
x-tenant.name: x-tenant

x-application-type.description: Unique request identifier for tracing requests across systems.
x-application-type.name: x-application-type

batchId.description: Unique identifier assigned to the batch payment request.

organizationId.description: Identifier of the organization initiating the batch payment.

initiatorId.description: User or system that initiated the batch payment process.

paymentCount.description: Total number of individual payments included in the batch.

currency.description: Currency used for all transactions in the batch.

totalAmount.description: Total aggregated value of all payments in the batch.

executionDate.description: Date when the batch payments should be executed.

priorityLevel.description: Priority assigned to the batch for processing.

sourceAccount.description: Account from which the batch payments will be debited.

paymentChannel.description: Channel through which the batch request is submitted.

callbackUrl.description: Optional webhook URL to notify when batch processing is completed.

scheduleId.description: Unique identifier for the recurring payment configuration.

payerAccount.description: Account number from which the recurring payment will be debited.

beneficiaryAccount.description: Destination account receiving the scheduled payment.

amount.description: Amount to be transferred in each scheduled payment.

currency.description: Currency used for the recurring payment.

startDate.description: Start date of the recurring payment schedule.

endDate.description: Optional end date when the recurring payments should stop.

maxExecutions.description: Maximum number of scheduled executions allowed.

paymentPurpose.description: Purpose or description of the recurring payment.

errorMessage.example: A recurring payment already exists for the specified schedule

transactionId.description: Unique identifier of the failed transaction.

originalPaymentId.description: Reference to the original payment request.

retryEnabled.description: Indicates whether automatic retry should be attempted.

maxRetryAttempts.description: Maximum number of retry attempts allowed.

retryIntervalSeconds.description: Interval in seconds between retry attempts.

fallbackPaymentMethod.description: Alternative payment method to use if retries fail.

notificationEmail.description: Email address to notify when failure handling workflow executes.

notificationPhone.description: Phone number to notify via SMS.

failureReason.description: Reason code explaining why the transaction failed.

accountId.description: Account associated with the failed payment.

currency.description: Currency of the failed payment transaction.

accountId.description: Account identifier to which the transaction limits apply.

userId.description: User identifier if limits apply to a specific user.

dailyLimit.description: Maximum amount allowed for transactions per day.

monthlyLimit.description: Maximum cumulative amount allowed per month.

perTransactionLimit.description: Maximum allowed amount per individual transaction.

effectiveDate.description: Date when the limit becomes active.

expiryDate.description: Optional expiration date for the configured limit.

approvalRequired.description: Indicates if limit configuration requires manual approval.

requestedBy.description: System or user requesting the limit configuration.

invoiceId.description: Unique identifier assigned to the invoice.

merchantId.description: Identifier of the merchant or organization issuing the invoice.

customerId.description: Identifier of the customer receiving the invoice.

invoiceAmount.description: Total amount to be paid by the customer.

invoiceDescription.description: Description of the products or services billed.

dueDate.description: Date when the invoice payment is due.

taxAmount.description: Applicable tax amount included in the invoice.

discountAmount.description: Discount applied to the invoice total.

paymentMethodsAllowed.description: List of payment methods allowed for invoice settlement.

callbackUrl.description: Webhook endpoint to notify when the invoice payment is completed.

transactionId.description: Unique identifier of the payment transaction being validated.

payerAccount.description: Account number from which the payment will be debited.

amount.description: Amount of the transaction being validated.

paymentChannel.description: Channel through which the payment was initiated.

paymentPurpose.description: Purpose or description of the payment.

complianceCheckRequired.description: Indicates if AML or compliance screening should be performed.

fraudCheckRequired.description: Indicates if fraud detection checks should be performed.

initiatorId.description: Identifier of the system or user initiating the validation.

transactionId.description: Identifier of the payment transaction being confirmed.

payerAccount.description: Account from which the payment was debited.

amount.description: Amount of the transaction being confirmed.

paymentChannel.description: Channel used to initiate the payment.

confirmationMethod.description: Method used to confirm the payment.

otpCode.description: One-time password used for confirming the transaction.

deviceId.description: Identifier of the device used to confirm the payment.

location.description: Geographic location from where the confirmation was initiated.

initiatedTimestamp.description: Timestamp when the confirmation request was initiated.

transactionId.description: Unique identifier of the transaction to be evaluated for fraud.

deviceId.description: Device identifier used during transaction initiation.

ipAddress.description: IP address from which the transaction originated.

location.description: Geographic location associated with the transaction.

behavioralProfileId.description: Identifier of the customer's behavioral risk profile.

transactionId.description: Reference identifier of the transaction for which the fee is collected.

accountId.description: Account from which the service fee will be deducted.

feeAmount.description: Base service fee amount applied to the transaction.

currency.description: Currency used for the fee transaction.

taxAmount.description: Applicable tax amount applied to the fee.

paymentChannel.description: Channel through which the transaction was initiated.

initiatorId.description: System or user initiating the fee collection.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the fee collection request was created.
